projectDescription: A personal portfolio and developer hub for Sel (@seleneftw), built with Svelte 5, SvelteKit 2, and Tailwind CSS 4, featuring a bento-grid layout, dynamic accent colors, internationalization, GitHub project integration, and Stats.fm music activity.
keyFeatures: Bento-grid responsive layout with glassmorphism UI cards
Dynamic per-visitor accent color system with SSR FOUC prevention
Internationalization in English, Italian, German, and Spanish via svelte-i18n
Live GitHub repository archive with in-memory caching and language breakdown stats
Stats.fm music activity widget showing current/recent listening
SvelteKit SSG output for zero-JS static hosting on GitHub Pages or Cloudflare Pages
View Transition API navigation animations for desktop
Security headers via SvelteKit server hooks
publicApiSurface: / — Home page with bio, clock, and music widget
